历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 890 → 955 → 1547 → 1823 → 1835, showing a continuous backward shift, with a cumulative shift of about 945 places from 2021 to 2025; from 2024 to 2025, it increased by only 12 places, indicating a significant slowdown in the backward trend, with a baseline of about 1835 in 2025; from 2021 to 2024, the Physics Category enrollment plan was 27–28 students, but in 2025 it was significantly reduced to 19 students (a decrease of about 30%), and the 2026 plan remains at 19 students, unchanged from 2025, with the reduction effect already reflected in the 2025 ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 17th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable upward trend in recent years (from 18th in 2021 to 17th in 2026), belonging to the top universities nationwide; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents; Douyin popularity ranking is 44th (relatively hot), with moderate attention; no obvious record of admission cutoff breaks; Law A+, Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A+, Statistics A+, Computer Science and Technology A, etc., with humanities, social sciences, mathematics, and statistics all at the top level, highly matching the Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Statistics, Artificial Intelligence, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other majors are highly recommended with high social popularity, while Artificial Intelligence majors are cautiously observed; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 380,000, a significant increase of about 46% compared to 260,000 in 2025, leading to intensified competition; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch has risen from 417 points to 463 points from 2021 to 2025, increasing slightly year by year; Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, not a local university in the province, with no local enrollment preference; the university's enrollment scale in Jiangsu is small (about 19 students in Physics Category), and cross-province application competition is affected by national attention.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift in historical rankings but stabilization from 2024 to 2025, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, a significant increase of about 46% in local Physics Category candidates leading to intensified competition, and the high social popularity of Renmin University's Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer/AI/Statistics), it is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will move forward by about 50 places compared to the 2025 baseline of 1835; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1785, with a range of 1535–2035.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)

- Artificial Intelligence (Beijing)
- Computer Science (Beijing) (Turing Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Statistics (Beijing) (Statistics and Data Science Top Talent Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Beijing) (National Economy and Data Science Innovation Talent Class)
- Statistics (Beijing) (Data Intelligence Scientist Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Beijing) (Finance and Big Data Technology Innovation Talent Class)
- Statistics (Beijing) (Including Applied Statistics, Statistics, and 4 other majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1535–2035, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main target, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1500), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors like Computer Science (Turing Experimental Class) and Artificial Intelligence; if your ranking is in the middle of the range (about 1700–1900), prioritize Tier 2 majors like Statistics/Top Talent Class; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 2000), it is recommended to use Tier 3 as a safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1340 → 126 → 163 → 131 → 194. In 2021, the inclusion of the Human Resource Management major (ranking 1340) lowered the overall figure, while from 2022 to 2025, the core ranking fluctuated between 126 and 194. The 2025 baseline ranking is about 194, a drop of 63 places compared to 2024's 131. Enrollment plans were 30 from 2021 to 2022, reduced to 26 from 2023 to 2024, expanded to 36 in 2025, and further expanded to 38 in 2026, with two consecutive years of expansion slightly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 17th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, top nationally in humanities and social sciences, known as the 'highest temple for liberal arts students'. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (teacher ethics incident), but in 2025, reputation was neutral/mixed (positive achievements such as A++ in Journalism and Communication). Douyin popularity ranking is 44th (relatively hot), with moderate attention. No obvious admission gaps or breaks recorded. A+ disciplines include Law, Applied Economics, Journalism and Communication, Sociology, Business Administration, Theoretical Economics, etc., leading the nation in the number of A+ disciplines in humanities and social sciences, highly matching the History Category admission majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is relatively hot, Finance/Economics shows divergence and caution, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category examinees in the province is about 140,000, a significant increase of about 45% compared to 2025's 97,000, intensifying competition. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch rose from 476 in 2021 to 482 in 2025, increasing slightly year by year. Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, not a provincial university. Its enrollment scale for History Category in Jiangsu is about 38, and cross-provincial applications are affected by national attention.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the ranking drop in 2025, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (38 vs 36), the significant increase of about 45% in provincial History Category examinees intensifying competition, and the top position of Renmin University in humanities and social sciences continuing to attract high-scoring students, it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move forward by about 24 places compared to the 2025 baseline of 194. The predicted minimum ranking is about 170, with a range of 120–220.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 120–220, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main force, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 120), prioritize Tier 1 Law and Finance. For rankings in the middle range (about 150–180), mainly choose Tier 2 Public Finance and Business Administration. For rankings near the upper limit (around 200), it is advisable to select Tier 3 Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class and Sociology as safety options.
